audio_analysis.reason: Decoded audio samples are silent; preserve source frame timing instead of beat extraction.

visual_analysis.motion_blur: moderate during fastest jumps and kicks
visual_analysis.occlusion_risk: moderate during self-crossing limbs; low from background people
visual_analysis.reason_for_crop: Keeps the large foreground dancer while excluding most left-side spectators.

processing_plan.pose_system: MediaPipe legacy Pose full model bundled in mediapipe 0.10.18
processing_plan.fallback_pass: expanded static-image detection for missed frames
processing_plan.smoothing: short-window interpolation, median filtering, and Savitzky-Golay smoothing
